query:
SELECT email, COUNT(*) as count, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY createdAt ASC) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(openId ORDER BY createdAt ASC SEPARATOR '|') as openIds, MIN(createdAt) as first_created, MAX(createdAt) as last_created
FROM users
GROUP BY email
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY count DESC;
